ratchet_policy: Bumped 2026-06-20 to 120 clusters / 7000 duplicate LOC (owner-authorized, #1711) to absorb the plot relink feature (bug#7) — RelinkOutcome and relink_plot are structurally similar to the existing scaffold/validation outcomes in the same tools_plot package, adding ~1 cluster / +30 LOC (scan: 100 clusters / 5729 LOC).
